profile.name: Jane Doe
profile.bio: Co-founder & CTO at Acme. Building AI developer infrastructure. Previously Infrastructure @ Stripe. YC S23.

posts.text: We just crossed 1,000 teams using Acme's inference gateway in production. When we started, everyone told us developers wouldn't pay for latency. Grateful to our early customers who bet on us.
Reflections on going from IC to founder: the hardest skill was learning to hire people better than me. A thread on what worked and what didn't.
Proud that Acme was selected for the YC S23 batch. To every founder still grinding pre-traction: keep talking to users.

comments.text: Congrats on the milestone — betting on latency was the right call.
Impressive traction. Would love to connect.
